final:
// // This module implements a 3-bit down/up counter with an enable signal. When the enable signal is high, the counter decrements its value by one on each rising edge of the clock if the up_down signal is high, and increments by one if the up_down signal is low. If the enable signal is low, the counter retains its current value.
module UpDownCounter (
    input clk,
    input en,
    input up_down,
    output reg [2:0] count
);

    always @(posedge clk) begin
        if (en) begin
            if (up_down) begin
                count <= count + 1;
            end else begin
                count <= count - 1;
            end
        end
    end
endmodule

params_used.custom_text: // This module implements a 3-bit down/up counter with an enable signal. When the enable signal is high, the counter decrements its value by one on each rising edge of the clock if the up_down signal is high, and increments by one if the up_down signal is low. If the enable signal is low, the counter retains its current value.
